SILKSONGRELICS-SHARD_PENDANT.title: Shard Pendant
SILKSONGRELICS-SHARD_PENDANT.flavor: Crude trinket worn by collectors and crafters.
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGNETITE_BROOCH.title: Magnetite Brooch
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGNETITE_BROOCH.descript: At the start of your turn, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and return it to your hand.
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGNETITE_BROOCH.flavor: Holy stone inscribed with a prayer for rosaries.
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGNETITE_BROOCH.selectio: Choose a card to add to your hand.
SILKSONGRELICS-WEIGHTED_BELT.title: Weighted Belt
SILKSONGRELICS-WEIGHTED_BELT.description: Played Attack cards(more than 0 cost) no longer go to the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] or [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold]; instead, they return directly to your hand.
SILKSONGRELICS-WEIGHTED_BELT.flavor: Heavy band favoured by those with an unsteady step.
SILKSONGRELICS-BARBED_BRACELET.title: Barbed Bracelet
SILKSONGRELICS-BARBED_BRACELET.descripti: When attacked,  additionally lose [blue]3[/blue] HP (even if [gold]Blocked[/gold]), and double the damage you deal.
SILKSONGRELICS-BARBED_BRACELET.flavor: Vicious bracelet worn by those who believe they have not been duly punished.
SILKSONGRELICS-DEAD_BUG_PURSE.title: Dead Bug Purse
SILKSONGRELICS-DEAD_BUG_PURSE.flavor: Discarded purse of a fallen pilgrim.
SILKSONGRELICS-SHELL_SATCHEL.title: Shell Satchel
SILKSONGRELICS-SHELL_SATCHEL.description: Increase your maximum hand size to [blue]12[/blue] cards.
SILKSONGRELICS-SHELL_SATCHEL.flavor: Quick access container formed from an old shell.
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGNETITE_DICE.title: Magnetite Dice
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGNETITE_DICE.descriptio:
Whenever you lose HP, roll a D20. If the result is not 1 or 2, prevent that much damage; otherwise, double the HP lost.
Whenever you cause an enemy to lose HP, roll a D20. If the result is not 1 or 2, increase that damage by the same amount; otherwise, the damage dealt becomes zero.
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGNETITE_DICE.flavor:
Playthings carved from magnetic material.
Used in simple games and believed to bring luck to the bearer.
SILKSONGRELICS-SCUTTLEBRACE.title: Swift Spine Lock
SILKSONGRELICS-SCUTTLEBRACE.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] all Skill cards in your deck with [purple]Swift[/purple] [blue]2[/blue].
SILKSONGRELICS-SCUTTLEBRACE.flavor:
Artificial spine that clasps tight around the shell.
Enhances the wearer's innate flexibility, allowing rapid retreat.
SILKSONGRELICS-ASCENDANT_GRIP.title: Ascendant Grip
SILKSONGRELICS-ASCENDANT_GRIP.descriptio: At the end of your turn, choose any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Retain[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-ASCENDANT_GRIP.flavor: Gilded piton that allows one to hold in place while on a wall.
SILKSONGRELICS-ASCENDANT_GRIP.selectionS: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Retain[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-SPIDER_STRING.title: Spider String
SILKSONGRELICS-SPIDER_STRING.description: Whenever you play a card that gives yourself a positive effect, double that effect(Once per turn).
SILKSONGRELICS-SPIDER_STRING.flavor: Sophisticated Weaver device. Resonates with music played to amplify and enhance a performance.
SILKSONGRELICS-SILKSPEED_ANKLETS.title: Silkspeed Anklets
SILKSONGRELICS-SILKSPEED_ANKLETS.descrip: Every time you draw [blue]10[/blue] cards, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-THIEF_MARK.title: Thief's Mark
SILKSONGRELICS-THIEF_MARK.description:
When you deal unblocked damage, gain that much [gold]Gold[/gold] (does not work on kills).
Whenever you lose HP, lose that much [gold]Gold[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-THIEF_MARK.flavor: Symbol worn to identify oneself to fellow thieves.
SILKSONGRELICS-EGG_OF_FLEALIA.title: Egg of Flealia
SILKSONGRELICS-EGG_OF_FLEALIA.descriptio: At the start of each combat, if your HP is not below [blue]75%[/blue], reduce the energy cost of all your cards by [blue]1[/blue] for that combat.
SILKSONGRELICS-EGG_OF_FLEALIA.flavor: Icon of the mythical mother flea, passed down from caravans of old. A symbol of protection and kinship.
SILKSONGRELICS-PIN_BADGE.title: Pin Badge
SILKSONGRELICS-PIN_BADGE.description: Whenever you play an Attack card with energy cost greater than or equal to {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()}, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SILKSONGRELICS-PIN_BADGE.flavor: Emblem of the Order of the Pinstress, the old blademasters of Pharloom.
SILKSONGRELICS-WISPFIRE_LANTERN.title: Wispfire Lantern
SILKSONGRELICS-WISPFIRE_LANTERN.descript: At the end of your turn, if you have unspent {Energy:energyIcons()}, apply [blue]5[/blue] stacks of [gold]Ignite[/gold] to that many random enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-WISPFIRE_LANTERN.flavor:
Broken iron lantern containing smouldering wispfire.
Wisps will spawn from the lantern and burn foes, at the cost of Silk.
SILKSONGRELICS-WREATH_OF_PURITY.title: Wreath of Purity
SILKSONGRELICS-WREATH_OF_PURITY.descript: Once per combat, right-click this relic to remove all negative effects from yourself.
SILKSONGRELICS-WREATH_OF_PURITY.flavor: Fragile band woven of reed and leaf, crafted to repel Muckmaggots.
SILKSONGRELICS-LONGCLAW.title: Longclaw
SILKSONGRELICS-LONGCLAW.description: Your Attack cards will be played an additional time.
SILKSONGRELICS-LONGCLAW.flavor: Talisman fashioned from the talon of a large predator.
SILKSONGRELICS-QUICK_SLING.title: Quick Sling
SILKSONGRELICS-QUICK_SLING.description: Whenever you play a card that costs [blue]0[/blue] energy, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
SILKSONGRELICS-QUICK_SLING.flavor: Taut-drawing mechanism built from reed and bone, intended for mounting on the limb of a bug.
SILKSONGRELICS-VOLT_FILAMENT.title: Volt Filament
SILKSONGRELICS-VOLT_FILAMENT.description: Whenever you play a Skill card, deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
SILKSONGRELICS-VOLT_FILAMENT.flavor: Can be coiled around thread, imbuing Silk Skills with electric charge.
SILKSONGRELICS-SNITCH_PICK.title: Snitch Pick
SILKSONGRELICS-SNITCH_PICK.description: Whenever a non-[blue]Minion[/blue] enemy dies, drop [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Relic[/gold] reward.
SILKSONGRELICS-SNITCH_PICK.flavor: Hooked tool for the forceful retrieval of loot from bugs and husks.
SILKSONGRELICS-CLAW_MIRRORS.title: Twin Claw Mirrors
SILKSONGRELICS-CLAW_MIRRORS.description:
Once per combat, right-click this relic to [gold]Stun[/gold] all enemies.
At the end of your turn, deal [blue]2[/blue] damage to a random enemy for each card in your hand.
SILKSONGRELICS-CLAW_MIRRORS.flavor: Twin theatrical tools of a vainglorious bug.
SILKSONGRELICS-RESERVE_BIND.title: Reserve Bind
SILKSONGRELICS-RESERVE_BIND.description:
Right-click this relic, consume [blue]1[/blue] count, and restore {Energy:energyIcons()} to its maximum.
Count will be automatically restored at [gold]Rest Site[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-RESERVE_BIND.flavor: Ornate artefact of the Citadel, able to hold a Bind's worth of Silk.
SILKSONGRELICS-SILK_EXTENDER.title: Silk Extender
SILKSONGRELICS-SILK_EXTENDER.description: At the end of your turn, if you have unspent {Energy:energyIcons()}, gain that much {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn (up to your maximum {Energy:energyIcons()}).
SILKSONGRELICS-SILK_EXTENDER.flavor:
Silk-storing tool of the Citadel, fashioned after an artefact of the Weavers.
Allows the storing of additional Silk beyond one's natural abilities.
SILKSONGRELICS-INJECTOR_BAND.title: Injector Band
SILKSONGRELICS-INJECTOR_BAND.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, also make that enemy lose HP equal to your current {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SILKSONGRELICS-INJECTOR_BAND.flavor: Brace of surgical pins from the Whiteward. Used to forcefully insert Silk deep inside a bug's shell.
SILKSONGRELICS-DRUID_EYES.title: Druid Eyes
SILKSONGRELICS-DRUID_EYES.description: Whenever you take unblocked damage, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
SILKSONGRELICS-DRUID_EYES.flavor:
Powerful amulet of protection formed from many Mossberries.
As the bearer takes damage, the amulet weeps a green elixir that will form into Silk.
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGMA_BELL.title: Magma Bell
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGMA_BELL.description: When attacked, apply [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Ignite[/gold] to the attacker.
SILKSONGRELICS-MAGMA_BELL.flavor: Forged iron bell, crafted to ward against the intense heat of the Deep Docks.
SILKSONGRELICS-WARDING_BELL.title: Warding Bell
SILKSONGRELICS-WARDING_BELL.description: When attacked, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [blue]3[/blue] + count. Each time this triggers, increase the count by [blue]1[/blue]. Reset the count at the start of your turn.
SILKSONGRELICS-WARDING_BELL.flavor: Holy bell inscribed with a hymn of protection.
SILKSONGRELICS-POLLIP_POUCH.title: Pollip Pouch
SILKSONGRELICS-POLLIP_POUCH.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, apply half that much [gold]Poison[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-POLLIP_POUCH.flavor: Pouch containing a fast-acting venom drawn from a flower's heart.
SILKSONGRELICS-FRACURED_MASK.title: Fractured Mask
SILKSONGRELICS-FRACURED_MASK.description: When you take fatal damage, survive with [blue]1[/blue] HP, then become disabled (can be automatically restored at [gold]Rest Site[/gold]).
SILKSONGRELICS-FRACURED_MASK.flavor: Old bug's skull carved for protection. Shields against critical damage but shatters on impact.
SILKSONGRELICS-WEAVEIGHTER.title: Weaveighter
SILKSONGRELICS-WEAVEIGHTER.description: At the start of your first [blue]3[/blue] turn, gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SILKSONGRELICS-WEAVEIGHTER.flavor: Gleaming apparatus of Weaver make. Its core emits a faint glow.
SILKSONGRELICS-MULTIBINDER.title: Multibinder
SILKSONGRELICS-MULTIBINDER.description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] fewer card and heal [blue]3[/blue] HP.
SILKSONGRELICS-MULTIBINDER.flavor: I rarely sell objects as intriguing as this. Supposed to improve a bug's natural ability to heal! Can't say I've felt its effects myself, but then I keep more healthy than most. — Freya
SILKSONGRELICS-SAWTOOTH_CIRCLET.title: Sawtooth Circlet
SILKSONGRELICS-SAWTOOTH_CIRCLET.descript: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, deal [blue]12[/blue] damage to all enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-SAWTOOTH_CIRCLET.flavor: This band of metal teeth, sharp and light-fine. It could be woven within your red outer layer? A hidden weapon.– Twelfth Architect
SILKSONGRELICS-STRAIGHT_PIN.title: Straight Pin
SILKSONGRELICS-STRAIGHT_PIN.flavor: Light throwing tool, designed for rapid attacks.
SILKSONGRELICS-THREEFOLD_PIN.title: Threefold Dart
SILKSONGRELICS-THREEFOLD_PIN.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]10[/blue]: Deal [blue]4[/blue] damage [blue]3[/blue] times to random enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-THREEFOLD_PIN.flavor: Flat, layered weapon, crafted to be thrown in a set.
SILKSONGRELICS-STING_SHARD.title: Sting Shard
SILKSONGRELICS-STING_SHARD.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]6[/blue]: Deal [blue]10[/blue] damage, and deal [blue]4[/blue] damage to other enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-STING_SHARD.flavor: Lethal trap formed of tightly bound blades.
SILKSONGRELICS-TACKS.title: Tacks
SILKSONGRELICS-TACKS.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]10[/blue]: Randomly cause [blue]5[/blue] enemies to lose [blue]2[/blue] HP at the end of turn.
SILKSONGRELICS-TACKS.flavor:
Short pins designed to be scattered along the ground.
The sharp points will pierce any enemy who steps upon them.
SILKSONGRELICS-LONG_PIN.title: Long Pin
SILKSONGRELICS-LONG_PIN.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]10[/blue]: Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from an enemy, then deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to it.
SILKSONGRELICS-LONG_PIN.flavor: Weighted pin and haft, formed to pierce tough shells.
SILKSONGRELICS-CURVECLAW.title: Curveclaw
SILKSONGRELICS-CURVECLAW.description:
[gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]8[/blue]: Deal [blue]3[/blue] damage [blue]2[/blue] times.
This relic will automatically upgrade at the start of Act 3.
SILKSONGRELICS-CURVECLAW.flavor: Arched sharpbone used by hunters to take down flying prey.
SILKSONGRELICS-CURVESICKLE.title: Curved Sickle
SILKSONGRELICS-CURVESICKLE.flavor: Radial sharpbone used by skilled hunters to take down dangerous prey.
SILKSONGRELICS-PIMPILLO.title: Pimpillo
SILKSONGRELICS-PIMPILLO.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]4[/blue]: Apply [blue]15[/blue] stacks of [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-PIMPILLO.flavor:
Fabric pouch filled with volatile material.
Explodes on impact with enemies or when ignited by its fuse.
SILKSONGRELICS-THROWING_RING.title: Throwing Ring
SILKSONGRELICS-THROWING_RING.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]10[/blue]: Deal [blue]4[/blue] damage, and deal an additional instance of damage for each enemy alive.
SILKSONGRELICS-THROWING_RING.flavor: Blunt force weapon that rebounds between enemies and hard surfaces.
SILKSONGRELICS-CONCHCUTTER.title: Conchcutter
SILKSONGRELICS-CONCHCUTTER.flavor:
Spiral weapon fashioned from a hardened conchspire.
Thrown at an angle, it can ricochet and catch prey off guard.
SILKSONGRELICS-SNARE_SETTER.title: Snare Setter
SILKSONGRELICS-SNARE_SETTER.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]5[/blue]: The next time you are attacked, deal [blue]25[/blue] damage to all enemies[blue].
SILKSONGRELICS-SNARE_SETTER.flavor: Trap-setting tool of the Weavers. Lays a Silk rune that ignites when foes come into contact.
SILKSONGRELICS-FLINTSLATE.title: Flintslate
SILKSONGRELICS-FLINTSLATE.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]3[/blue]: Damage dealt this turn is increased by 50%. Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, apply [blue]3[/blue] stacks of [gold]Ignite[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-FLINTSLATE.flavor:
Sharpening slate made from cut and polished Flintgem.
Temporarily super heats the needle's blade, imbuing each slash with flame and increasing lethality.
SILKSONGRELICS-VOLT_VESSELS.title: Volt Vessels
SILKSONGRELICS-VOLT_VESSELS.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]5[/blue]: Randomly cause enemies to lose [blue]3[/blue] HP [blue]6[/blue] times.
SILKSONGRELICS-VOLT_VESSELS.flavor:
Convertible orbs containing electricity.
The vessels can be thrown as a bola for an explosive discharge or staked as a spear to release a column of energy.
SILKSONGRELICS-ROSARY_CANNON.title: Rosary Cannon
SILKSONGRELICS-ROSARY_CANNON.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]8[/blue]: Deal 0 damage. Spend [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]; damage dealt is increased by [blue]30%[/blue] of current [gold]Gold[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-ROSARY_CANNON.flavor:
ARepurposed mechanism from the base of a rosary stringing machine.
Rosaries must be inserted to reload the cannon.
SILKSONGRELICS-COGFLY.title: Cogfly
SILKSONGRELICS-COGFLY.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]4[/blue]: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage at random[blue].
SILKSONGRELICS-COGFLY.flavor: Winged cogwork companion that will seek nearby foes and attack.
SILKSONGRELICS-COGWORK_WHEEL.title: Cogwork Wheel
SILKSONGRELICS-COGWORK_WHEEL.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]5[/blue]: Deal [blue]14[/blue] damage to all enemies. Repeat this effect for each enemy killed.
SILKSONGRELICS-COGWORK_WHEEL.flavor: Expanding circular blade powered by a cogwork motor.Propels forward, slicing through foes.
SILKSONGRELICS-DELVER_DRILL.title: Delver Drill
SILKSONGRELICS-DELVER_DRILL.description: [gold]Tool[/gold] [blue]9[/blue]: If the enemy's intent is not an attack, deal [blue]24[/blue] damage and [gold]Stun[/gold] the enemy.
SILKSONGRELICS-DELVER_DRILL.flavor: Rotary tool used for boring into bone and rock.
SILKSONGRELICS-MEMORY_CRYSTAL.title: Memory Crystal
SILKSONGRELICS-MEMORY_CRYSTAL.descriptio: Whenever you take unblocked damage, clear the count and deal damage equal to the count to the attacker, then store the amount of damage taken as the new count.
SILKSONGRELICS-MEMORY_CRYSTAL.flavor:
Reflective stone with mnemonic properties.
When taking damage, a memory of the bearer is formed of crystal. The memory will shatter into sharp spines if an enemy comes into contact.
